objects.name: actions
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE actions (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
                device_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                action TEXT NOT NULL,
                target TEXT,
                status TEXT NOT NULL,
                details TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: alerts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE alerts (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                event_id INTEGER,
                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
                device_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                severity TEXT NOT NULL,
                risk_score INTEGER NOT NULL,
                title TEXT NOT NULL,
                details TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: devices
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE devices (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                device_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                hostname TEXT,
                platform TEXT,
                token_hash TEXT,
                status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'unknown',
                last_seen TEXT
            , device_name TEXT, device_type TEXT, os TEXT, version TEXT, risk_score INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, health TEXT, agent_version TEXT, token_issued_at TEXT, token_rotated_at TEXT)

objects.name: events
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE events (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                timestamp TEXT NOT NULL,
                device_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                source TEXT NOT NULL,
                event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                severity TEXT NOT NULL,
                risk_score INTEGER NOT NULL,
                details TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: network_activity
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE network_activity (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                device_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                ip TEXT,
                port INTEGER,
                protocol TEXT,
                direction TEXT,
                risk_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                last_seen TEXT
            )

objects.name: processes
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE processes (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                device_id TEXT NOT NULL,
                pid INTEGER,
                name TEXT,
                command_line TEXT,
                risk_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
                last_seen TEXT
            )

objects.name: rules
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE rules (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                name TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                rule_type TEXT NOT NULL,
                enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                definition TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: settings
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE settings (
                key TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
                value TEXT NOT NULL
            )

objects.name: users
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE users (
                id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
                username TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
                role TEXT NOT NULL,
                password_hash TEXT
            )
